samples.description_vi: Tungsten oxide sub-stoichiometric, tổng hợp thủy nhiệt. Phase chính monoclinic P2/m. Peak đặc trưng 28.75° (010).
samples.description_en: Sub-stoichiometric tungsten oxide from hydrothermal synthesis. Main phase monoclinic P2/m. Characteristic peak at 28.75° (010).

samples.description_vi: Mẫu simulated TiO₂ pha anatase (tetragonal I4₁/amd) từ JCPDS 21-1272. Peak chủ đạo: 25.3° (101), 37.8° (004), 48.0° (200). FWHM=0.10° (crystallite ~80 nm). Cu Kα. Dùng để demo + test pipeline.
samples.description_en: Simulated TiO₂ anatase (tetragonal I4₁/amd) from JCPDS 21-1272. Main peaks: 25.3° (101), 37.8° (004), 48.0° (200). FWHM=0.10° (crystallite ~80 nm). Cu Kα. For demo + pipeline testing.

samples.description_vi: Mẫu simulated ZnO pha wurtzite (hexagonal P6₃mc) từ JCPDS 36-1451. Peak chủ đạo: 31.8° (100), 34.4° (002), 36.3° (101). FWHM=0.10°. Cu Kα. Dùng để demo + test pipeline.
samples.description_en: Simulated ZnO wurtzite (hexagonal P6₃mc) from JCPDS 36-1451. Main peaks: 31.8° (100), 34.4° (002), 36.3° (101). FWHM=0.10°. Cu Kα. For demo + pipeline testing.
